description.ko: 수학적 질서가 디지털 글리치와 기하학적 엔트로피로 붕괴되는 과정을 보여주는 날카롭고 고대비적인 탐구.
description.en: A sharp, high-contrast exploration of mathematical order collapsing into digital glitch and geometric entropy.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract by KURO-X, titled 'Vectorized Chaos Theory.' The structure is captured mid-shatter, exploding into a calculated vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF void. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration cut through the frame. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical beauty of digital collapse.
